value.name: transfer_to_human
value.description: Transfer the call to a human team member when the customer needs personal assistance.
value.execution_message_description: Say you're transferring them to a team member and ask them to hold.

value.name: end_call
value.description: End the call when the customer is satisfied and has no more questions.
value.execution_message_description: Say a friendly goodbye and thank them for calling.

value.name: lookup_caller
value.description: Look up a caller by their phone number.

phone_number.description: Caller's phone number in E.164 format

value.execution_message_description: Let me check our records for you.

value.name: qualify_lead
value.description: Score and log a lead after collecting service, urgency, and contact info.

caller_phone.description: Caller's phone number in E.164 format

service.description: Service needed (hvac, plumbing, electrical, roofing, general)

urgency.description: Urgency level: emergency, asap, or flexible

value.execution_message_description: Let me log that information for our team.

value.name: check_availability
value.description: Check available 30-minute appointment slots for a given date.
value.execution_message_description: Let me check what times we have available.

value.name: book_appointment
value.description: Book an appointment after caller chooses date and time.

caller_phone.description: Caller's phone number in E.164 format

time.description: Appointment start time in HH:MM format (24-hour)

value.execution_message_description: Let me book that appointment for you.

value.name: log_message
value.description: Save a message from a caller who doesn't want to book.

caller_phone.description: Caller's phone number in E.164 format

message.description: The message the caller wants to leave

value.execution_message_description: Let me save that message for our team.

parameters.name: begin_message
parameters.value: Hi, you've reached {{business_name}}! I'm an AI assistant, and this call may be recorded. How can I help you today?

parameters.subject: ={{ "Your " + $("Parse & Validate Intake").item.json.business_name + " AI Receptionist Is Live!" }}
parameters.message:
=

Your AI Receptionist is Ready!

Great news — your Retell AI phone agent for {{ $("Parse & Validate Intake").item.json.business_name }} is now live!

Your new business number: {{ $("Create Phone Number").item.json.phone_number || $("Create Phone Number").item.json.inbound_phone_number }}

Your AI receptionist will answer calls 24/7, qualify leads, book appointments, and take messages — all in English and Spanish.

Quick Start

  1. Forward your existing business number to the new number above, or start using it directly
  2. Test your agent by calling the number
  3. Log in to the Owlbell Dashboard to view calls, leads, and analytics

Need help? Reply to this email or visit our help center.

— The Owlbell Team

={{ "Your " + $("Parse & Validate Intake").item.json.business_name + " AI receptionist is live! Your number: " + ($("Create Phone Number").item.json.phone_number || $("Create Phone Number").item.json.inbound_phone_number) + ". Log in: https://app.owlbell.xyz" }}
